name: Face Time
description: A shotgun variant with a Jakobs barrel, boosting pellet count at the cost of spending two rounds per shot. That gives it stronger single-shot burst than a more typical version, but it pays for it in ammo efficiency.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, Face Time variants often spawn with newer Hyperion materials and prefixes that match the Borderlands 2 version. Its internal name is "Bilateral Face Time," with "Bilateral" functioning as a replaceable prefix. It can drop randomly from any suitable loot source.
